gamerule.doAnimalStarvation.description: Lepidopera API: Enables animal starvation, allowing animals to take damage to the point of death when their food meter reaches 0.
network.lepidoptera_api.versionMismatch: Incompatible Lepidoptera API version. Server: %s, Client: %s
text.autoconfig.lepidoptera/config.optio: Shift-click to equip alembic to head slot
Allows the alchemical alembic to be shift-click equipped into the helmet slot.
Changing this requires a server restart to take effect.
The server value is pushed to clients on join.
§eOnly enable this if you know what you are doing.§r
Enable crafting recipes using the alembic
Enables breakable crafting recipes that use the alchemical alembic.
Changing this requires a server restart or /reload to take effect.
The server value is synced to the clients on join.
Show alchemical alembic in creative tab
Allows the alchemical alembic to appear in the creative tabs.
§eChanging this value requires a full server restart.§r
text.autoconfig.lepidoptera/config.title: Lepidoptera API
